news.title: Why Rocket Lab Stock Is No Longer Just A Launch Story
news.summary: Rocket Lab (RKLB) has undergone a fundamental valuation rerating, with its stock delivering a 240 percent return over the past year to reach a 45.4 billion dollar market capitalization. (See why RKLB stock moved). The Q1 2026 results indicate that the company has transitioned from its origins as a small-cap launch provider into a large-cap aerospace prime mover. news.title: What Rocket Lab (RKLB)'s Record Q1, Backlog Surge and Defense Wins Mean For Shareholders
news.summary: In early May 2026, Rocket Lab Corporation reported record first‑quarter 2026 results, with revenue rising to US$200.35 million and its net loss narrowing to US$45.02 million, while also lifting second‑quarter guidance and its contracted backlog to more than US$2.20 billion.
